generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that our reliance on foreign tech for critical infrastructure is making us vulnerable? Just last year, a minor cyber incident in a key ally caused delays in our emergency response systems. We can't afford to gamble with our security. It's time to prioritize strategic autonomy—because when it comes to national defense, we can't trust others to have our back. #NationalSecurityFirst
